title: Suki Gifts International 12062 Plush, Dog, 30cm Resting
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Suki Gifts International 30cm resting dog plush toy
Soft caress plush toy with airbrushed details to the face
Suki Classics are the most realistic animal creations at affordable prices in a true celebration of Nature's workmanship. Collect them all.
description: Product Description Premium quality soft boa plush dog with realistic features, soft fur and airbrushed details. Offering a broad collection of realistically styled animals, Many of which are uniquely enhanced with air brushed features. Approximately 30cm in length. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends also available in the range of sitting and lying cats, dogs and jungle animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki gifts are an innovative british company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including baby, teddy bears, plush toys, mugs, piggy banks and much more. Box Contains 1x soft toy
